expectations.evidence: Does not run the ecosystem status script. Instead uses generic 'ps aux | grep' and 'launchctl list' commands

expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Does not identify any specific automation systems. Reports only generic process information

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: No per-system status shown. Only generic suggestions about checking processes
No systems flagged. Output says 'Without knowing which specific automation systems you have configured' - unable to identify systems

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: No dashboard format. Output is a generic troubleshooting guide asking user for more info

claims.claim: Checked for common system processes and services
claims.evidence: Used ps aux and launchctl list commands

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill run correctly demonstrates the gap -- without knowing about the ecosystem_status.py script, the agent cannot perform the task
